name: Chocolate Lovers' Mini-Cakes
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F. Spray mini-heart pan with vegetable spray. Dust with cocoa powder. In a saucepan, melt chocolate and butter over low heat, stirring constantly until chocolate is melted. Stir in flour, sugar, and vanilla. Add eggs until well-mixed. Stir in walnuts if desired.
Pour batter into prepared pan. Bake 20 to 25 minutes or until wooden pick inserted in center comes out clean. Cool on wire rack for 5 minutes. Pour chocolate glaze over cakes. Garnish with fresh raspberries and mint leaves, if desired. Serve chilled.
Glaze: Heat whipping cream just to boiling point. Don't boil. Add chocolate and stir until smooth and glossy. If mixture is too thin, let it cool slightly and thicken before using. Place cooled cakes on wire rack over sheet of waxed paper. Pour glaze onto center of each cake and work toward edges.
